items.briefing:
A new report from Acronis highlights that AI is helping cybercriminals launch attacks faster and at greater scale, a growing concern for Australian organisations of all sizes. Separately, a cybersecurity firm called Expel has flagged a criminal group targeting certificate trust systems, which could allow attackers to impersonate trusted websites or software — something staff should be aware of when clicking links or downloading files.

On a more positive note, Truecaller has joined a global telecoms body to help reduce scam calls worldwide, which may eventually benefit Australians plagued by phone scams. **Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected call asking for personal or financial details, hang up and call the organisation back using a number from their official website.

featured.title: URSYS launches secure Layer 2 Starlink for remote sites
featured.quote: Frontier AI is lowering the bar for cybercrime, enabling attackers to scale phishing and malware attacks.
